BIB.description: First record of each BIB section. N1=number of keywords in the BIB section, disregarding pointers in col.11 N2=number of records in the BIB section

COMMON.description: First record of each common data section. N1=number of common data fields N2=number of records in COMMON section

DATA.description: First record of each DATA section. N1=number of data fields N2=number of data lines in the table excluding headings and units (if N1 is greater than 6 a data line consists of two or more records)

ENDBIB.description: Last record of each BIB section. N1=number of records in BIB section

ENDCOMMON.description: Last record of common data section. N1=number of records in common data section

ENDDATA.description: Last record of DATA section. N1=number of records in DATA section

ENDENTRY.description: Last record of each work (accession number). N1=number of sub-works in entry

ENDSUBENT.description: Last record of each sub-work. N1=number of records within the subwork

ENDTRANS.description: Last record on transmission file. N1=number of works on the transmission file N2=number of dictionaries in dictionary transmission file

ENTRY.description: First record of each work (accession number). N1=5-digit accession number N2=date of entry on file or last update (yyyymmdd)

NOBIB.description: Used when there is no BIB information in a sub-work.

NOCOMMON.description: Used when there is no common data in a sub-work.

NODATA.description: Used when there is no data in a sub-work.

NOSUBENT.description: Indicates subentry assigned, but empty. Either deleted or included in another subentry. N1=sub-accession number

SUBENT.description: First record of each sub-work. N1=8-digit sub-accession number N2=date of entry on file or last update (yyyymmdd) N3=special use for identifying data types N4,N5=may contain center internal information

TRANS.description: First record on a transmission file. N1=transmission tape no. (center-id*1000 + seq.num) N2=date of transmission tape generation (yyyymmdd). N3=may contain a library name.
